# Thee Rainers — llms.txt
# Boxing performance coaching, digital products, and training systems.
# Contact: rainers@theerainers.com

## What this is

Thee Rainers is a boxing performance brand built around a 7-lever operating system. The methodology combines kinetic chain mechanics, perceptual training, and identity-level performance — applied to amateur and competitive boxing.

Built by Rainers: competitive boxer, coach, and creator. 331K Instagram, 90K TikTok, 15K YouTube (@theerainers / @Rainers).

The site is theerainers.com. It runs a vertical funnel: free content → free protocols → paid blueprints → live workshop → Private Architecture (1-of-1 coaching).

## Free Resources

### 30-Day Stance Foundation (Free)
The mechanical base: stance, weight distribution, kinetic chain. 30 days. No equipment needed.
URL: https://theerainers.com/footwork-foundation
PDF: https://theerainers.com/pdfs/footwork-foundation.pdf

### 7-Lever Audit (Free)
Self-assessment for competitors. Rate yourself on each of 7 levers. Identifies your primary performance bottleneck before your next fight.
URL: https://theerainers.com/lever-audit

### Interactive 7-Lever Quiz
7 questions, 3 minutes, instant score. Routes to the right next step based on results.
URL: https://theerainers.com/lever-audit-quiz

## Products

### Bundle — Both Blueprints ($87)
Footwork Blueprint + Shadowboxing Blueprint. Complete system. 100+ drill rounds. Monthly Live Q&A included.
URL: https://theerainers.com/vault

### Footwork Blueprint ($47)
Full video breakdown. 56 drill rounds. 30-day progression. The kinetic chain base everything else runs on.
URL: https://theerainers.com/vault

### Shadowboxing Blueprint ($47)
Turn shadowboxing into realistic boxing. Skill tests. Range control. The kinetic chain applied in motion.
URL: https://theerainers.com/vault

### Defense Workshop ($197)
90 minutes live. Camera on. Real-time correction on actual movement. Saturday, June 27, 2026.
URL: https://theerainers.com/workshop

### Workshop Replay ($79)
Full 90-minute recording on demand. Footwork, stance, punch mechanics, defensive structure.
URL: https://theerainers.com/workshop-replay

## Private Architecture

1-of-1 custom coaching. Application only. No templates. No cohorts. A system engineered around the applicant's specific fight, body, and mind.
URL: https://theerainers.com/command

## Monthly Q&A

Live, one hour, one Saturday per month. Included with any paid product. Real-time diagnosis through the 7 levers.
URL: https://theerainers.com/qa

## The 7 Performance Levers

Each lever maps to a biblical virtue and a specific training intervention.

1. Cue Reading (Diligence) — Perceptual: seeing punches arrive, not feeling them land
2. Kinetic Chain (Chastity) — Mechanical: floor-up power transfer, 76% of punch power starts at the floor
3. Reactive Stiffness (Fortitude) — Conditioning: springy footwork maintained by round 4
4. Range Fluency (Temperance) — Tactical: generating offence at close, mid, and long range
5. Defensive Responsibility (Justice) — Structural: guard holds while throwing combinations
6. Transfer to Live (Faith) — Application: sparring performance matches pad work standard
7. Identity & Presence (Humility) — Existential: system holds when hurt and behind on points

Deep-format YouTube breakdowns on boxing mechanics, kinetic chain, and systemic performance.
URL: https://theerainers.com/library
